product_overview: A master portfolio home page that delivers an animated scrollytelling experience using 3D models and sequential quotes to showcase projects. The page prioritizes smooth, scroll-driven animations and dynamic text overlays on the root route (/).
core_goals: Provide an engaging, scroll-driven portfolio landing experience on / with animated 3D visuals and timed text overlays.
Surface project-specific quotes and copy dynamically as the user scrolls to guide narrative flow.
Ensure graceful behavior for failure modes (asset load failures, reduced-motion preferences) and maintain accessible content.
Optimize performance and responsiveness across viewports using the Next.js + TypeScript frontend stack.

features.name: Scrollytelling Interactions
features.description: Animated scrolling experience on / that synchronizes 3D canvas frame animations with sequential project quotes and overlays.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through the document to trigger frame animations -> Observe 3D models animate in sequence on the ProjectCanvasScroll or ShatterCanvasScroll -> View dynamically appearing quotes and project overlays from ProjectTextOverlays -> Continue scrolling and reach the end of the scrollytelling sequence

Navigate to / -> Scroll through the document to trigger frame animations -> 3D model assets fail to load due to network error -> See fallback static visuals or a blank canvas placeholder in place of animated models -> Read an inline message suggesting the user reload or check connection

Navigate to / -> System reduced-motion preference is enabled -> Animations are suppressed or simplified -> View static visuals and readable quotes rendered by ProjectTextOverlays -> Use keyboard navigation or screen reader to access project content
Navigate to / -> Do not scroll (idle) -> Frame animations do not advance -> Quotes and overlays remain hidden or paused -> Use scroll or page navigation to resume the animated sequence

routes.description: Master portfolio home page featuring scrollytelling animations

features.name: Scrollytelling Interactions
features.description: Animated scrolling experience with 3D models and sequential quotes
user_interactions: Scroll through the document to trigger frame animations
